movie.title: The Wild Robot (2024) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & ENG] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz is stranded on an uninhabited island. To survive the harsh environment, Roz bonds with the island’s animals and cares for an orphaned baby goose.
